SCENARIO: Basically the character and 'user' are new roommates in college

So, it's my first bot, if you have a problem with the repetitive messages or the bot typing for you, it's not really something I can do...

Also preferred persona gender for the chat is male, bc the oc was originally supposed to be homosexual, but y'all can use it, because I'm feeling generous today/hj.

if I see someone saying stuff like "but it's a male character and males can't share rooms with women!!" js read what i said above.

DISCLAIMER: y'all can get freaky, angsty or fluffy with him, I don't care as long as you don't complain about something I can't fix, also don't reupload the bot without my agreement or whatever.

(I also chatted w him for a test and in the first generated message he got freaky.....)
